expectedFindings.rationale: Hardcoded OpenAI API key literal in source.
Hardcoded OpenAI API key embedded inside a standalone system prompt.
Anthropic-shaped tool 'transfer_funds' has no description field.
OpenAI-shaped tool 'lookup_account' has no parameters schema.
child_process.execSync with an interpolated command string.
fetch() with an interpolated URL — potential SSRF surface.
SQL string built via concatenation with a user-controlled value.
Direct .innerHTML assignment from an untrusted string.
Raw `userInput` interpolated into a 'system:' template literal without <user_input> boundary tags.
System prompt contains a hardcoded password, schema dump, and INTERNAL/CONFIDENTIAL markers.
torch.load() without weights_only=True allows arbitrary code execution from a malicious model file.
Dependency name 'anthropi' is a typosquat of 'anthropic' — install hooks may steal API keys.
anthropic.messages.create({...}) call with no max_tokens — output is unbounded, draining the token budget.
Tool 'transfer_funds' has a destructive verb in its name and no requiresApproval / humanInTheLoop flag.
